items.title: Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war
items.dek: It follows a decision by the Spanish government to deny the US use of the two jointly run military bases in Andalusia.
items.body: It follows a decision by the Spanish government to deny the US use of the two jointly run military bases in Andalusia.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 48-hour curfew imposed after attack on bar in Nigerian city
items.dek: The raid led to revenge attacks in Jos, with 22 reported dead so far in one of the most volatile parts of the country.
items.body: The raid led to revenge attacks in Jos, with 22 reported dead so far in one of the most volatile parts of the country.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russia expels British diplomat over spying allegations
items.dek: A UK Foreign Office spokesman accused Russia of an "aggressive and co-ordinated campaign of harassment against British diplomats".
items.body: A UK Foreign Office spokesman accused Russia of an "aggressive and co-ordinated campaign of harassment against British diplomats".
items.author: IriLine Desk
